scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ai-cli-switch/shared && npm run build --workspace @ai-cli-switch/daemon && npm run build --workspace @ai-cli-switch/web && npm run build --workspace @ai-cli-switch/cli
scripts.dev:daemon: npm run build --workspace @ai-cli-switch/shared && npm run dev --workspace @ai-cli-switch/daemon
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @ai-cli-switch/shared && npm run dev --workspace @ai-cli-switch/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @ai-cli-switch/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @ai-cli-switch/daemon && npm run typecheck --workspace @ai-cli-switch/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @ai-cli-switch/cli
